title: Halliburton's stock edges lower as second-quarter revenue falls short of estimates
text: Halliburton Co.'s stock HAL, +2.01% edged lower in premarket trade Wednesday, after the oil services company's second-quarter revenue fell slightly short of estimates. title: Halliburton Announces Second Quarter 2023 Results
text: HOUSTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Halliburton Company (NYSE: HAL) announced today net income of $610 million, or $0.68 per diluted share, for the second quarter of 2023. This compares to net income for the first quarter of 2023 of $651 million, or $0.72 per diluted share. Adjusted net income4 for the second quarter of 2023, excluding the loss on transactions in Argentina, was $691 million, or $0.77 per diluted share.
